releaseNotes: • Internal robustness pass (from a code review): debug log now actually rotates at its 20 MB cap during a long session instead of only when toggled; the backup-import dialog wording now matches what it does (adds/updates sources, keeps existing ones); a database migration registration-order issue that could crash debug builds was corrected (release builds were never affected); and two minor resource-handling tidies (a slider focus-node leak and a stray empty DVR cache folder on low disk).
